role: Engineering Manager — SRE / Operations / Cloud Infrastructure
details: Lead SRE, Operations, and Cloud Infrastructure teams supporting cloud platform reliability and operational execution.
Drive reliability, scalability, incident management, and cloud platform maturity across production-facing systems.
Improve operational excellence through clearer ownership, disciplined operating rhythms, and automation strategy.
Partner with engineering teams to reduce toil, improve observability, and strengthen incident response practices.
Translate reliability risk into business impact and actionable engineering priorities.
